item.title: City Council to Hold Closed Session Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will meet for a closed session on December 15, 2026, at the City Council Chambers located at 501 Poli St. The city calendar did not list specific agenda details for this meeting.

item.title: City Council Rules Subcommittee Meeting Scheduled
item.description: A City Council Rules Subcommittee meeting will take place on December 14, 2026, at the Community Meeting Room located at 501 Poli St., Ventura. The city calendar did not list specific agenda details for this meeting.

item.title: Economic Development Subcommittee Meeting Scheduled
item.description: The Economic Development Subcommittee will meet on December 10, 2026, at the Anacapa Meeting Room located at 501 Poli St., Ventura. The city calendar did not list specific agenda details for this meeting.

item.title: City Council Committee to Review Standing Committees
item.description: A City Council committee will review the standing committees on April 7, 2026, at the Community Meeting Room on Poli Street. The city calendar did not list specific agenda details for this meeting. Local residents can attend to learn more about the council's committee structure.

item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will meet for a closed session on March 24, 2026, at 5:00 PM at 57 Day Rd. The city calendar did not list specific agenda details for this meeting.
